reference: Hi Madam, welcome to HCM. I understand your problem. After having surgery, pain is normal. If you feel severe pain, use Tramadol tablets only after dinner and apply Diclofenac gel as well. I hope you are satisfied with my answer. Thank you.
text: Hi, madam. Welcome to HCM. I understand your problem. After having surgery, pain is normal. If you feel severe pain, use tramadol tablets only after dinner and apply diclofenac gel as well. I hope you are satisfied with my answer. Thank you.
